productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Ganesha Red Black T-shirt
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% stretchable cotton fabric, with a ribbed neckline and tape inseam, short sleeves, flat seams, reinforced tear points, printed label, split hem with inseam lining and graphic print on the frontFitComfortWash care Hand wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Flat dry in shade Enjoy those mind-calming sessions of yoga and get the ability to absorb the challenges of life like Ganesh in style and comfort in this urban yoga tee. Made of pure, sweat absorbant cotton, this t-shirt is stitched with flat seams and a printed label to prevent irritation, allowing you to concentrate on your yoga activity. With reinforced tear points, be assured that this tee will stay with you for years, while the grippy garment ensures it doesn't slip and cause discomfort when you exercise. The stretchable, soft fabric and split hem is all that you need to feel at ease during those exercise sessions. Team this with urban yoga pants or capris for that ultimate in comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
